projectDescription: A FOSS policy automation and orchestration toolkit for managing open source software dependencies, generating SBOMs, and automating compliance checks.
keyFeatures: Dependency analysis across 30+ package managers (npm, Maven, Gradle, pip, Cargo, etc.)
License and copyright scanning using ScanCode, FossID, Licensee and other scanners
Security vulnerability advisory via OSV, OSS Index, VulnerableCode, and Black Duck
Policy as Code with customizable Kotlin-script evaluation rules
SBOM generation in CycloneDX and SPDX formats
Flexible reporting: HTML, web app, plain text notices, and custom FreeMarker templates
Docker support with all required tools pre-installed
CI/CD integrations for GitHub Actions and GitLab Pipelines
Package metadata curation and license finding corrections
Configurable compliance pipeline: Analyzer → Downloader → Scanner → Advisor → Evaluator → Reporter
publicApiSurface: ort scan — scan source code for licenses and copyrights
ort advise — retrieve security advisories for dependencies
ort evaluate — apply policy rules to scan results
ort report — generate reports and SBOMs
ort download — fetch source code of projects and dependencies
ort notify — send result notifications via email or JIRA
ort requirements — list required external tools
.ort.yml — per-project configuration for excludes, curations, and resolutions
OrtResult — core data model (YAML/JSON) output by each tool stage
evaluator.rules.kts — Kotlin script DSL for custom policy rules
